narrative:
Pleasant Twp township has 1,023 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
